items.sentence: Aiden discovered that singing the same song 47 times in a row can really annoy his brother.
Ashwin’s ability to eat three slices of pizza in two minutes will astound anyone watching.
The puppy had boundless energy and chased its own tail for twenty straight minutes.
The class decided to boycott broccoli day in the cafeteria.
Running away from a tiny spider might seem a little cowardly.
Aiden didn’t want to disappoint his team, so he practiced his free throws.
While exploring the backyard, Lulu had a surprising encounter with a very grumpy squirrel.
Aiden tried to hoist his heavy backpack onto his shoulders like a superhero.
Lulu showed great loyalty by following Ashwin everywhere—even into the bathroom.
There was total outrage when someone ate the last cookie.
The cat began to prowl around the kitchen, searching for dropped snacks.
Ashwin tried to rouse his sleepy friend by shouting, “PIZZA IS READY!”
Aiden gave a dramatic scowl when he realized homework was still waiting for him.
Ashwin hoped his team would trounce their rivals in the soccer game.
The classroom was in turmoil when the teacher announced a pop quiz.
The referee blew the whistle after a player committed a foul.
The farm had chickens, ducks, and other noisy fowl.
The tide came in and slowly covered the sandcastle.
Aiden tied his shoelaces before running to the playground.
